title: Tapping to Trust Myself With Millions
subtitle: A tapping practice for building confidence in your ability to hold and manage large wealth
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 65 of a 12-week money program. The script targets the unease that large numbers can bring — the fear of mishandling big wealth, of making mistakes at that scale, of not being ready. The reframe moves toward settled confidence in handling great wealth with clarity and ease.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 65 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when thinking about large financial numbers brings discomfort, self-doubt, or a sense of not being ready — the belief that managing significant wealth is something other people do, not you.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 65 of a 12-week money program. The script targets the unease that large numbers can carry — the worry about mishandling big wealth, making mistakes at that scale, or not being ready for significant financial responsibility. The reframe moves toward calm confidence: trusting your skills, your judgement, and your ability to hold and grow great wealth.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though big numbers once made me nervous, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I doubted I could manage millions wisely, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I worried about mistakes at that level, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I picture millions in my accounts.
Side of eye: I used to feel uneasy with that thought.
Under eye: I feared I might mishandle it.
Under nose: I wondered if I was ready.
Chin: Those doubts no longer serve me.
Collarbone: I trust my growth and skills.
Under arm: I feel safe as wealth expands.
Top of head: I stand steady with millions.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: I am fully capable of holding millions.
Side of eye: I make wise, calm money decisions.
Under eye: I enjoy caring for big numbers with ease.
Under nose: I trust my systems and team.
Chin: I feel confident as wealth grows significantly.
Collarbone: I love the freedom and impact wealth brings.
Under arm: I handle large amounts with clarity and joy.
Top of head: I trust myself completely with great wealth.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 65 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
